title: TIP-1.0 Client Profile
description: Per-client inbound profile (CLI, TUI, API, IDE, cron, batch). Describes how requests from this client kind should be routed and whether the companion should attach. See https://docs.tokenpak.ai/protocol/manifest-spec.

mode.description: How the client is consumed by the user.

companion_eligible.description: Whether the companion pre-send optimizer attaches for this client. True for cli/tui/ide; false for api/sdk (which get full proxy pipeline instead per Constitution §3).

detection.description: How TokenPak detects this client at runtime (per Constitution §5.4 discovery).

header_signature.description: Header pattern this client emits (e.g. 'X-Claude-Code-*'). Used by profile-detection in routing.

env_signature.description: Environment variable pattern the client sets.
